The Myth of the Smart Worker in the Data-Driven Workplace

30 Nov, 2021

I was invited to speak at Wales TUC’s workers and new technologies event at the Senedd in November 2021, on behalf of United Tech and Allied Workers (UTAW).

Adapted from a draft of my article, The Myth of the Smart Worker in the Data-Driven Workplace, I highlighted the problematic mythologies of AI and automation in the workplace, and the very real inequalities they can create.
